entry.value: SELECT CAST(arrest_key AS BIGINT) AS arrest_key, arrest_date_id, CAST(pd_cd AS INT) AS pd_cd, pd_desc, CAST(ky_cd AS INT) AS ky_cd, ky_desc, CAST(law_cat_cd AS INT) AS law_cat_cd, CAST(arrest_boro AS INT) AS arrest_boro, CAST(arrest_precinct AS INT) AS arrest_precinct, CAST(jurisdiction_code AS INT) AS jurisdiction_code, CAST(age_group AS INT) AS age_group, perp_sex, ROUND(CAST(latitude AS DOUBLE), 5) AS latitude, ROUND(CAST(longitude AS DOUBLE), 5) AS longitude FROM FLOWFILE

entry.key: Max Length To Put In Attribute

value.name: Max Length To Put In Attribute

entry.key: Max Length To Put In Attribute

entry.value: SELECT arrest_key, CAST(REPLACE(arrest_date, '-', '') AS INT) AS arrest_date_id, pd_cd, CASE WHEN TRIM(pd_desc) = '(null)' OR pd_desc IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE TRIM(pd_desc) END AS pd_desc, ky_cd, CASE WHEN TRIM(ofns_desc) = '(null)' OR ofns_desc IS NULL THEN NULL ELSE TRIM(ofns_desc) END AS ky_desc, CASE WHEN TRIM(law_cat_cd) = '(null)' OR law_cat_cd IS NULL THEN 'U' ELSE law_cat_cd END AS law_cat_cd, arrest_boro, arrest_precinct, jurisdiction_code, CASE WHEN TRIM(age_group) = '(null)' OR age_group IS NULL THEN 'Unknown' ELSE TRIM(age_group) END AS age_group, CASE WHEN TRIM(perp_sex) = '(null)' OR perp_sex IS NULL THEN 'Unknown' ELSE TRIM(perp_sex) END AS perp_sex, latitude, longitude FROM FLOWFILE WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(pd_desc), '') IS NOT NULL AND CAST(latitude AS DOUBLE) <> 0 AND CAST(longitude AS DOUBLE) <> 0 AND arrest_date <> '(null)' AND arrest_date IS NOT NULL LIMIT 200

entry.key: Permit Whitespace and Comments in Pattern

value.name: Permit Whitespace and Comments in Pattern

entry.key: Enable Literal Parsing of the Pattern

value.name: Enable Literal Parsing of the Pattern

entry.key: Permit Whitespace and Comments in Pattern
Enable Literal Parsing of the Pattern
